# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Snapshot Settings
snapshot.name: "my_snapshots"
snapshot.schedules:
  - schedule:
      cron: "* * * * *"
    name: "daily_snapshots"

# Snapshot Repository Settings
snapshot.repo.s3.bucket: "my-bucket"
snapshot.repo.s3.base_path: "/elasticsearch/backups/"
snapshot.repo.fs.location: "/path/to/file/share/"

# Snapshot Policy Settings
snapshot.policies:
  - snapshots:
      schedule:
        cron: "* * * * *"
    name: "daily_snapshots_policy"

# Elasticsearch Config (in elasticsearch.yml)
indices:
  recovery:
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "1g"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "1g"
